title: tephroseris balbisiana
intro: Tephroseris balbisiana, also known as the mountain everlasting, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and an antioxidant, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Tephroseris balbisiana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
